description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Checks that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.11, 3.12, 3.13). In each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip, test with pytest, and submit code coverage to Codecov using a CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
